title: Video by hockeyfitnesscoach
description:
OFF-SEASON = FIX YOUR BODY 🏑

If you want to move better, stay injury-free, and actually feel sharp when pre-season hits… this needs to be part of your DAILY routine.

Run through this mobility flow 👇

• Deep Squat – 2 x 30–45 sec hold 
• Child’s Pose w/ Reach – 2 x 8 reps each side 
• Quadruped T-Spine Rotations – 2 x 10 reps each side 
• World’s Greatest Stretch – 2 x 6 reps each side 
• 90/90 Hip Rotations – 2 x 10 reps 
• Deep Squat & Reach – 2 x 8 reps

Do this every day in the off-season and watch how much smoother, quicker, and stronger you feel on the pitch. Mobility isn’t optional if you want to perform at a high level.

#fieldhockey #hockeyfitness #hockeytraining #hockeylife #strengthandconditioning
